title: ctenitis samoensis
intro: Ctenitis samoensis, also known as the Samoan tree fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Samoan medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis samoensis include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Ctenitis samoensis typically involve drying the fronds and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
